steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank follows “Defined by a disorganized molecular structure,” — a participial phrase. Each choice offers a different noun to start the following clause. Identify: which noun appears as the subject immediately after the participial phrase?

steps.title: Apply the modifier rule
steps.content: A participial phrase opening a sentence must be immediately followed by the noun it modifies. “Defined by a disorganized molecular structure” describes amorphous ice, so choice B is correct: “amorphous ice lacks the thermal energy to form the crystals found in ice Ih.” places amorphous ice as the subject right after the phrase. Choices A, C, and D start with different nouns, violating this rule. That matches choice B — B is correct.
